must_contain: One trace with id name timestamp userId sessionId environment tags and metadata.
negative_case: Direct userId or sessionId copied into redacted expected rows.
validation_rule: Redacted expected rows contain tenant-salted hashes and no direct source identity.

must_contain: One GENERATION and one SPAN with core basic time IO metadata model usage prompt and metrics fields.
negative_case: Default field-group response without IO usage prompt or metrics accepted as complete.
validation_rule: Harness requires requested field groups and verifies all required groups appear.

must_contain: Second page with final cursor null and malformed generation output JSON.
negative_case: Importer stops at page 1 or embeds malformed output in loss report.
validation_rule: Harness proves cursor exhaustion and no-sample parse-failure loss row.

must_contain: Numeric boolean categorical mapped categorical unmapped and text score rows.
negative_case: External score copied into k_score or eval_score.
validation_rule: Harness fails if K-score fields appear and checks every score emits kolm-score-1 evidence.

must_contain: Numeric scale direction threshold boolean evidence map and one categorical map.
negative_case: Unmapped categorical label silently accepted for eval selection.
validation_rule: Harness requires loss code score.categorical_map_missing.

must_contain: Dataset name metadata version inputSchema and expectedOutputSchema.
negative_case: Schema-invalid item accepted without loss.
validation_rule: Harness validates item shape or records schema loss without raw samples.

must_contain: Active item with expected output archived item and missing expected-output item with source trace links.
negative_case: Archived or missing-expected item becomes artifact eval case.
validation_rule: Harness emits exactly one evalcase and loss rows for skipped items.

must_contain: Dataset-run score target fields or explicit empty array with reason.
negative_case: Dataset-run score attachments ignored without manifest note.
validation_rule: Harness preserves dataset_run_id when present or documents fixture omission.

must_contain: Source region source retention Kolm retention purge_after and source deletion refs.
negative_case: Manifest lacks retention_days or purge_after.
validation_rule: Harness requires manifest privacy retention and deletion reference fields.

must_contain: Trace observation and score rows with structured messages hashes metrics costs and score attachments.
negative_case: Raw malformed output or direct identity appears.
validation_rule: Harness scans for blocked raw values direct identity and source samples.

must_contain: Exactly one evalcase with input expected output and allowlisted metadata.
negative_case: sourceTraceId sourceObservationId score id user id or session id embedded.
validation_rule: Harness applies artifact eval allowlist and source-id denylist.

must_contain: Spec manifest id source fixture dataset version privacy counts purge_state and artifact list.
negative_case: Counts diverge from source rows and expected outputs.
validation_rule: Harness recomputes counts and checks no missing source pages.

must_contain: Parse failure non-generation skip score-map miss archived skip and missing expected-output losses.
negative_case: Loss row includes raw malformed output sample.
validation_rule: Harness requires sample_included false outside raw mode.

must_contain: Checksums counts source refs and no IO payload text.
negative_case: Hash-only mode retains message content.
validation_rule: Harness deny-lists message content and requires source row checksums.

must_contain: Same loss classes as redacted with no source samples.
negative_case: Hash-only report drops loss paths needed for audit.
validation_rule: Harness compares loss codes and counts against redacted mode.

must_contain: Rows scores raw sidecars loss reports cache keys writebacks artifacts and blocked targets.
negative_case: Delete or anonymize tested before dry-run contract.
validation_rule: Add after manifest fixture passes and require zero destructive side effects.

must_contain: Source checksum and per-row checksums for every fixture input row.
negative_case: Symbolic checksums shipped in executable fixtures.
validation_rule: Harness computes real canonical JSON checksums before accepting pack.

must_contain: CSV shape JSON parse JSONL parse denylist counts mode comparison and no-K-score checks.
negative_case: Only golden-file snapshot tested without semantic assertions.
validation_rule: Harness must test semantics listed in blueprint acceptance requirements.

must_contain: Official Langfuse observation dataset score retention deletion docs and local CLI/router/capture refs.
negative_case: Fixture fields cannot be traced to a source or local gap.
validation_rule: Every file row references at least one source-register ref.

must_contain: Fixture pack validates pagination field groups privacy manifest loss and score-map behavior first.
negative_case: Live Langfuse API fetch merges before fixture parity passes.
validation_rule: Backlog and CI should block live connector until all fixture files validate.
